scenario: Supplier or logistics disruption affects production and product availability
Connected manufacturing or production-support systems are disrupted by cyber activity
Vendors have inconsistent access control logging or security review practices
Users accumulate permissions beyond their job role over time
Accounts are not consistently created reviewed modified or disabled
Mobile devices lack consistent authorization encryption or configuration requirements
Logs do not capture enough detail to support investigations or accountability
Security-relevant logs are not reviewed quickly enough to detect unusual activity
Security flaws are not identified tested remediated or tracked consistently
Unexpected changes to software firmware or configuration baselines go undetected
Lack of tested playbooks delays containment and recovery
Critical operations lack tested continuity and recovery plans
